since_last: 45% of 100 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.48%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 45% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.31% · BTC +1.27% · Gold -0.33% · Nasdaq100 +0.28%. 45% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.48%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.48%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.82%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +16.46%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +16.46%, META +5.85%, NVDA +3.34%, AI +2.82%, UEC +2.51%. Laggards: RXRX -6.52%, S -5.86%, OKTA -5.43%, CRWD -5.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.25% at $148.74
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.25% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
